## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] New feature / new stage engine
- [ ] Docs / translation

## Checklist
- [ ] Change is focused and small.
- [ ] If I touched an agent, its independence rules are intact (esp. black-box QA:
      QA must not read the dev's source).
- [ ] Kept the kit free & Claude-Code-native (no paid API / hosted server required).
- [ ] Preserved the contract-based handoff and Definition of Done (DoD) model.
- [ ] Updated docs/README if behavior or setup changed.
